name: DL-14 | Deal creator - Stuffed crust - Appeareance after cancelling
description: If user added Stuffed Crust to the pizza using a pop up, they will not  see the pop up again when adding another pizza to the deal
descriptionHtml: If user added Stuffed Crust to the pizza using a pop up, they will not see the pop up again when adding another pizza to the deal

testStage.description: If user added Stuffed Crust to the pizza using a pop up, they will not  see the pop up again when adding another pizza to the deal
